query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN email LIKE '%@example.com' THEN 'seed_fake'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@ga-import.local' THEN 'ga_import'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@anonymous.local' THEN 'device_guest_registered'
    WHEN openId LIKE 'device-%' THEN 'device_guest_registered'
    ELSE 'real_oauth_user'
  END AS user_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY user_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

SELECT

    WHEN email LIKE '%@example.com' THEN 'seed_fake'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@ga-import.local' THEN 'ga_import'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@anonymous.local' THEN 'device_guest_registered'
    WHEN openId LIKE 'device-%' THEN 'device_guest_registered'
    ELSE 'real_oauth_user'
  END AS user_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY user_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
